ac_verdicts.ac_text: SchedulerLoop gains a getEligibleReviewStories(limit: number) method that queries workflow.stories WHERE state = 'ready_for_qa' with no unresolved depends_on/blocked_by dependencies. Returns StoryRow[].

SchedulerLoop gains a dispatchReviewStory(story: StoryRow, attemptNumber: number) method that atomically advances ready_for_qa → in_qa via kb_update_story_status, returns early if updated:false, parses ReviewJobDataSchema, and calls queue.add() with jobId format {storyId}:review:{attemptNumber}.

SchedulerLoop.runOnce() is extended to: (a) compute review slots using the same shared maxConcurrent ceiling as implementation; (b) call getEligibleReviewStories(), apply ordering/filtering via applyFinishBeforeNewStart and applyStrictFinishFilter, and dispatch up to available slots via dispatchReviewStory().
SchedulerLoop gains a getEligibleQaStories(limit: number) method querying stories in state = 'in_qa' with no unresolved dependencies. Returns StoryRow[].

SchedulerLoop gains a dispatchQaStory(story: StoryRow, attemptNumber: number) method following the same F006 atomic advance + jobId pattern ({storyId}:qa:{attemptNumber}), building a QaJobDataSchema-compliant payload.
SchedulerLoop.runOnce() includes QA dispatch: calls getEligibleQaStories(), applies ordering/filtering, and dispatches up to available slots.

finishBeforeNewStart and strictFinishBeforeNewStart ordering/filtering applies consistently to review and QA eligible story lists. Both applyFinishBeforeNewStart() and applyStrictFinishFilter() are called with the review/QA eligible lists before dispatch.
A unit test verifies that dispatchReviewStory() is called with a story in ready_for_qa state during a runOnce() cycle when a slot is available.
A unit test verifies that dispatchQaStory() is called with a story in the correct QA-trigger state during a runOnce() cycle.
A unit test verifies that dispatchReviewStory() does NOT call queue.add() when kb_update_story_status returns updated:false (F006 preservation — mirrors PIPE-2040 AC-7 pattern).
A unit test verifies that review and QA dispatch pass the correct jobId format: {storyId}:review:1 and {storyId}:qa:1 to queue.add() options.
TypeScript compilation (pnpm check-types --filter @repo/pipeline) passes with zero errors after all changes.
All tests in apps/api/pipeline/src/scheduler/__tests__/scheduler.test.ts pass. pnpm test --filter @repo/pipeline exits 0.

F006 deviation for QA dispatch is documented: no KB state advance because no valid intermediate state exists between in_qa and completed/failed_qa/blocked. BullMQ jobId dedup is the idempotency fence.
